seoTitle: Integrate GoHighLevel With WhatsApp: Setup Guide
metaDescription: Connect GoHighLevel with WhatsApp to manage customer communication, automate conversations, and build WhatsApp workflows.
intro: Managing WhatsApp communication from within GoHighLevel lets you keep every customer conversation, reminder, and marketing message in one system. This tutorial covers connecting your WhatsApp Business account, configuring messaging settings, and building automated WhatsApp workflows.

steps.heading: Connect WhatsApp to GoHighLevel
steps.body: Link your WhatsApp Business account to your GoHighLevel account to start the integration process.

steps.heading: Configure messaging settings
steps.body: Set up your messaging preferences so WhatsApp communication flows correctly through GoHighLevel.

steps.heading: Create WhatsApp automation
steps.body: Build workflows that automate conversations for lead nurturing, appointment reminders, and marketing campaigns.

steps.heading: Manage customer conversations efficiently
steps.body: Use GoHighLevel to track and respond to WhatsApp conversations alongside your other messaging channels.

steps.heading: Improve engagement with automation tools
steps.body: Apply tips for using WhatsApp automation to streamline communication and boost customer engagement.

faq.question: How is this different from connecting Facebook or SMS?
faq.answer: This tutorial specifically focuses on integrating your WhatsApp Business account, though the workflow automation concepts are similar across channels.

faq.question: Can I send appointment reminders through WhatsApp?
faq.answer: Yes, automating appointment reminders is one of the use cases covered in the tutorial.

faq.question: Is this useful for customer support?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial highlights customer support teams as one of the key audiences for this integration.

faq.question: Can I run marketing campaigns through WhatsApp with this setup?
faq.answer: Yes, building WhatsApp workflows for marketing campaigns is covered as one of the use cases.

faq.question: Who is this tutorial for?
faq.answer: Agencies, marketers, business owners, sales teams, customer support teams, and GoHighLevel beginners.
